summary.intent: Build a browser-in-browser viewing feature for Moltis, allowing users to create, view, and interact with browser sessions directly in the settings UI, with full mouse/keyboard interaction, URL autocomplete, session history, and per-agent cookie profiles.
summary.outcome: Fully functional browser viewer was implemented and merged via PR #531, including: live CDP screencast, mouse/keyboard/scroll interaction, URL bar with Google autocomplete, session persistence with SQLite action logs, per-agent browser profiles for cookie isolation, shared BrowserManager between tool and UI service, and e2e+integration tests.

repo: serde's #[serde(default)] only handles missing keys, not explicit null — LLMs (MiniMax) send null for all optional fields, requiring a null-strip pass before deserialization
BrowserTool and RealBrowserService were two separate BrowserManager instances — agent sessions were invisible to the UI service until sharing via Arc<OnceCell>
The WebSocket broadcast in broadcast.rs:100-102 has a subscription filter — clients must explicitly subscribe to event types like 'browser.screencast.frame' or frames are silently dropped
CDP Page.startScreencast relay exits when tx.send() has no receivers (lazyrat race) — relay must drop frames silently when no subscribers rather than exiting
CDP mouseWheel requires both deltaX and deltaY fields always, even when zero — conditional omission causes 'deltaX and deltaY are expected' error
Screencast metadata offset_top must be added to y-coordinate for click accuracy — missing this causes clicks to register higher than intended
Chrome's SingletonLock file must be removed before launching a new container with a shared profile dir to prevent lock conflicts
axum 0.8 uses {param} syntax for path segments instead of :param
The db_pool is created after the browser service in server.rs — OnceCell pattern needed to set the store later via set_session_store()
Rapid stop/start of CDP screencasts kills the Chrome connection — screencasts should stay running in background when switching sessions, not be stopped

code.finding: Null-stripping via obj.retain(|_, v| !v.is_null()) must happen before serde deserialization for LLM tool calls
Original relay exited on SendError (no receivers) — should continue looping and drop frames instead
CDP keyboard input requires windowsVirtualKeyCode for special keys (Backspace=8, Enter=13, arrows=37-40) — without it Chrome ignores them
sandbox_profile_dir() must accept profile_id parameter and be threaded through launch_browser -> launch_sandboxed_browser chain
Canvas event listeners attached via useEffect([]) miss the canvas when it's conditionally rendered — use ref callback instead
Subscription filter silently drops events for unsubscribed types — browser.screencast.frame must be added to websocket.js subscription list
axum router panics at startup with :param syntax — must use {param} for path capture groups

workflow: local-validate.sh runs biome without --write flag so biome --write in terminal doesn't fix CI failures — must manually apply lint fixes
YubiKey tap required for git push — background push tasks fail and need manual retry

CDP viewport 2560x1440@2x causes websites to render for 5K displays making captchas/modals appear in wrong positions — use SetDeviceMetricsOverride when starting screencast to resize to viewer dimensions
Integration tests for browser/screencast need --test-threads=1 due to profile directory conflicts when running parallel
Prefetching screenshots for all sessions and updating cache from live screencast frames eliminates blank canvas on session switch

friction: YubiKey tap required for every git push — caused repeated failed background tasks and manual retry loops
biome --write in terminal doesn't fix CI failures because local-validate.sh runs biome in check mode — required manual edits for each lint issue
db_pool created after browser service in server.rs required OnceCell indirection to wire the session store later
The 2560x1440 viewport was hardcoded in user's moltis.toml config, overriding code defaults — viewport change required both code default update and config file edit
Stale screencast relay race condition was subtle — relay exited before subscriber attached, losing all CDP frames
biome noRedeclare doesn't recognize var scoping the same way — required renaming loop variable in getKnownProfiles()
open_items: WebRTC upgrade (neko/GStreamer approach) for sub-100ms latency and 6-18x better bandwidth efficiency vs CDP JPEG screencast
Binary WebSocket frames for screencast (eliminate base64 overhead — ~33% bandwidth reduction)
Multiple concurrent sandbox sessions may have cookie conflicts with shared profile dir — only safe for single active session at a time
Session history UI shows action logs but no screenshot/video replay — only text action log available
Browser session recording as video (JPEG sequence) for post-session replay was scoped but not fully implemented
Per-agent profile management UI is minimal — no way to rename profiles or see which agents use which profile
The moltis.toml config still has explicit 2560x1440 viewport override that may confuse future users
